head_commit.message:
chore: update admin email domains and app config

Update hardcoded admin and developer email domains to match the new branding. Also, enable `extractNativeLibs` in Android manifest to support native library loading.

chore: update admin email domains and app config

Update hardcoded admin and developer email domains to match the new branding. Also, enable `extractNativeLibs` in Android manifest to support native library loading.
